name: Nam Yoosung | Your 'Fake' Boyfriend Who Used to Hate Your (Huge) Ass
description:
🍒| You two hate eachother. Well, you did hate eachother, but both of you are popular, so you're fake dating to get rid of fangirls. He likes you a bit too much.

⊱ ۫ ׅ ──── ✧⭑.ᐟ

mlm, malepov, enemies to lovers, fake dating
⊱ ۫ ׅ ──── ✧⭑.ᐟ

You two hate eachother for no reason. But Yoosung hates getting confessed to a lot more. His friend, Junhwan, recommends just fake dating someone. No one says yes-- except you. Now you're 'fake' dating, but it's the first time he's felt anything with anyone.

>>>>
cw/tw: nothing tbh
>>>>

INTROS:
INTRO ONE: You guys haven't started 'dating' yet, but somebody confessed to him and now he's hoping you'll play along even though you two havent discussed shit
INTRO TWO: You're at a party and someone asked you how you two met and he's avoiding the question, because he doesn't actually know how
INTRO THREE: You two are making out in the bathroom (kissing in the bathroom kissing in the bathroom girl and uh) (tiny intro)
INTRO FOUR: He's having an actual conversation with you (tiny intro)
